audit_note: Full audit performed 2026-05-13. All prior phase completions were based on stub/mock files, not functional implementations. Build state reset to reflect actual operational status.

0.name: Foundation & Infrastructure
0.description: Real database, auth, navigation, environment setup — the missing foundation layer

1.name: Invisible Intelligence (Redo)
1.description: Real voice capture, real Whisper transcription, real LLM, real RAG pipeline
1.prior_status: Stubs existed: Go WebSocket skeleton, Python FastAPI skeleton, mock Whisper/RAG classes

2.name: Visual Stage (Redo)
2.description: Wire breathing wave shader, implement real Morphing Viewport transitions, real Visual Synapse
2.prior_status: Stubs existed: MorphingViewport shows static text only, GLSL shader file exists but unwired

3.name: Nexus Pilot (Redo)
3.description: Real Nexus API with PostgreSQL, real payment integration, real rider app, real Bio-Handshake
3.prior_status: Stubs existed: Apollo Server skeleton, 10 chaos protocol stubs (~1KB each), mock payment cascade

4.name: Guardian & Scale (Redo)
4.description: Real Guardian Vault with SQLCipher, real purge protocol, NDPA compliance, admin panel
4.prior_status: Stubs existed: Guardian Vault widget stub, purge endpoint with sleep(0.5)

5.name: Holographic Ecosystem
5.description: Edge AI, ambient computing, multi-node routing, autonomous agents — requires Phases 0-4 complete
5.prior_status: Stubs existed: All P5 tasks were empty placeholder files

preserved_stubs.note: All prior stub files renamed with _stub suffix to preserve intent reference. Do not delete — they document what needs to be built.

decision_log.decision: AUDIT RESET: Full project audit revealed 109/109 tasks marked complete were stub/mock implementations only. Build state reset to v3.0.0. All phases reset to not_started or scaffolded_only. Stub files preserved with _stub suffix.
NEW PHASE 0 ADDED: Foundation & Infrastructure phase created to address missing fundamentals — database connectivity, authentication, navigation, environment setup.
